docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, KENNETH
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY KENNETH LEE IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO AUG-04-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. - PLAINTIFF ARMANDO OSUNA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT KENNETH LEE IS PRESENT. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCES FOR THE NEXT HEARING. PARTIES ARE INSTRUCTED TO SEND ALL EVEDANCE TO THE COURT AND EACH OTHER AT LEASE 10 DAYS PRIOR THE THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,188.41 FILED BY OSUNA, ARMANDO AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, KENNETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSUNA, ARMANDO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSUNA, ARMANDO AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, KENNETH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-10-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, KENNETH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ARMANDO OSUNA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KENNETH LEE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSUNA, ARMANDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, KENNETH $5,188.41 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,188.41 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, KENNETH HEARING SET FOR JUN-16-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, KENNETH
ORDER RE: MOTION TO SET ASIDE
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 07/11/2025. REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS UNABLE TO FORWARD)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO VACATE, VACATING DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND CONTINUING TRIAL. FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, KENNETH
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-04-2025 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
